reviews.review_description:
I CONTACTED THE COMPANY THROUGH EMAIL LAST MONTH ABOUT THE ISSUES AND THEY REPLIED IT WOULD BE FIXED.  AN UPDATE CAME AND IT’S FIXED!!

THIS IS MY FAVORITE GAME I LOVE IT SO MUCH!  Thank you so much for replying and fixing it.

reviews.review_title: Now I feel like a restaurant chef
reviews.review_description:
Adorable game!
Pros:
+ Funny plot and awesome characters 
+ Amazing atmosphere 
+ Fantastic combination of mechanics 
+ It is both challenging and calming 
+ Simple but cozy graphic design
+ Upgrades

Cons:
- It takes a while to set the hight and your position inside the shop during sitting playing.

I recommend it to everyone, one of my fav VR games so far

This is a great simulator game that has you making many different combinations of bungeoppang (Fish Bread) as well as drinks to serve to increasingly more demanding customers.  I love everything about this game except for the excessive chatter from the companion fish bread fairy characters.  I've been hoping for a game like this for the past six years that I've been playing games in VR and VisualLight have done a great job with this one.  

If you'd like to check out gameplay from Lucky Fish Bread, here's my first bits of gameplay and some sampling of real Taiyaki and bungeoppang: https://youtu.be/p5LdfFg5U-g

reviews.review_title: Great game! I'd recommend it to everyone
reviews.review_description:
themetamanVR here! I find this game to be fun, challenging and very rewarding! Also, Korean.
If you like games based on time management, rewards, food and drink, this game is for you!
Love it. Great graphics, nice music. That fairy fish voice is annoying though. Luckily you can skip it.
I love this gameplay. However, the game crashes whenever Beanie the magical fish bread fairy waves his wand. I would love to play it, so if this bug ever gets fixed, I will adjust the review happily.

reviews.review_title: So fun cutest game and discounts
reviews.review_description: Discounts too so there isn’t any excuse now 😉LINK TR (dot)ee / serenitees24 no spaces Not for kids only but this is honestly fav cooking game I own and has been the 2 yrs I’ve played quest2 games came bk to c if updated some things so excited to c they did can’t wait to try😎🥰🥰🥰🥰
So fun. It gets so challenging and quite frantic, it feels a lot like actual food service, with less of the nitty gritty. I actually love these fish cakes in real life and highly recommend them!

If you like time management games that revolve around cooking and serving cuatomers with a time limit, then you might enjoy this too! 

There are however some annoyances here and there: 

1. Sometimes when the plate is above an item, it picks it up as well. So instead of just picking up 1 fish bread, your plate might get another extra from your storage when you hover over it.

2. It is also difficult to select a particular item when the storage (or the plate) is crowded. So example if you got the wrong fish bread, it's quite difficult to remove it from the plate

3. The knife is also a bit annoying to get because of the "height" and the "size" of it. It's a bit small and sometimes I miss getting it from my side. I suggest there are settings to adjust the height of the "holster"

4. The storage is too small! Maybe I haven't reached it yet but is there an option to upgrade it to make it bigger? I tend to prepare many stuff before each game and the crowded problem (see #1) makes it very difficult to select a particular item.

However, all in all, it's a very fun casual game. Would be great if it has coop or multiplayer mode.
